_comment_sizing: 5% of balance per trade — matches Bot Settings Max Position Size slider.
_comment_strategies: 1) EMA 200 Pullback — EMA200 trend, enter on EMA50 pullback with RSI 40-60. 2) RSI-2 Mean Revert — Larry Connors strategy, RSI(2) < 5 in uptrend / > 95 in downtrend.
_comment_sl_tp: SL = min(2×ATR, Bot Settings SL%). TP = max(4×ATR, Bot Settings TP%). Trailing stop if enabled in Bot Settings.
notes: v3: EMA200 Pullback + RSI-2 Mean Reversion (Connors). ATR-based SL/TP with hard limits. No time-limit exits. RSI-2 trades exit quickly once RSI normalises to 70/30.
